content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach demonstrates multiple specific, timely AoA reads that change the conversation. Turn 3 reads the flip — the client turning the experiment back on the coach — and surfaces it as self-observation rather than letting it pass. Turn 7 names the defensiveness explicitly ('That's almost defensive') in the exact moment the HR-toned politeness shows up under instruction to demand. Turn 13 reads the pattern that just got revealed ('notice what got revealed when you said it the first time') and names the control-pushes-away dynamic. Turn 15 distinguishes intellectual position from lived reception ('intellectually, that's where you are'). Turn 21 catches the precise linguistic slip ('we said PROTECTING. Your words were protecting') — a control-correction-on-language read at the exact moment the client tries to escape into meta-argument. Reads precede questions throughout, and they are specific to AoA territory (defensiveness-as-identity-signal, the-pattern-is-the-finding, control-as-defense).",
  "evidence_turns": [3, 7, 13, 15, 21],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Sets up the experiment frame; no read yet but establishes the laboratory."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the flip in real time and turns it into self-observation — 'how much of that was you taking responsibility for me understanding, and how much for my understanding?'"},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Escalates into the experiment with embodied specificity (eyes, internal stance) — implicit read that she's not landing in the demand."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the defensiveness precisely and briefly ('That's almost defensive') — defensiveness-as-identity-signal read at the exact moment."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Ignores the 'I can't' as resistance-content and routes around it with a new angle — implicit read of the-experiment-as-escape."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names what just happened in one sentence — crystallizes the pattern the experiment produced."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicit 'notice what got revealed' — names the pattern-is-the-finding read and the control-pushes-away dynamic."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinguishes intellectual position from lived reception — refuses to argue at the metaphor level."},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Routes the read through the other person's stance — uses position-switch to surface what the client herself does."},
    {"turn": 19, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the ego-protection pattern in the client's own behavior using her own words from turn 18."},
    {"turn": 21, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Precision control-correction-on-language: catches the slip from 'protecting' to 'ego' and returns to the exact distinction."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["defensiveness-as-identity-signal", "the-experiment-as-escape", "rehearsing-how-to-say-it", "control-as-defense", "chasing-pushes-away", "the-pattern-is-the-finding", "ego-protection-vs-ego-presence"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Reads are consistently specific, timely, and precede or ground the next question. The turn-21 linguistic catch is a particularly clean control-correction-on-language read."
}
